name: @pryzm/storage-driver
description: PRYZM 2 — storage driver abstraction (ADR-003 isolation).  Bake worker, sync server, and editor all write chunks/manifests through this single interface.  Implementations: InMemoryStorageDriver (default for dev/test), R2StorageDriver (Cloudflare R2 / MinIO via the S3-compatible API), and the env-gated `createStorageDriver()` factory.
